prompt: For my e-commerce app I need to generate around 50,000 product thumbnails a month plus a few hundred hero banners that have a lot of text on them. Which Nano Banana model should I use for each, roughly what will the images cost, and can I generate the thumbnails at 512px to save money?

assertions.text: Recommends Nano Banana 2 / gemini-3.1-flash-image for the high-volume thumbnails
Recommends Nano Banana Pro / gemini-3-pro-image for the text-heavy hero banners
States 512 (0.5K) is Flash-only and Pro cannot generate 512
Uses correct per-image pricing: Flash 512 ~$0.045, Pro 1K/2K ~$0.134
Computes a sane monthly thumbnail cost (~$2,250 for 50k at $0.045)
